description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs, rst and trigger_build, using the default test stage for rst and an explicit deploy stage for trigger_build. The rst job runs in a python:latest Docker image, runs a before_script that installs Pygments and rstcheck via pip, and then executes the shell command `rstcheck --ignore-directives youtube --ignore-languages c --report-level warning *.rst`. The trigger_build job runs in a fedora:latest Docker image, declares a needs on the rst job, and is configured with an only:variables rule that requires the $TOKEN variable to be present. In the deploy stage it runs `curl -X POST -F token=$TOKEN -F ref=master https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/api/v4/projects/spice%2Fspice-space/trigger/pipeline` to trigger a downstream pipeline.
